{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Pioneer world six thousand twenty-four
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Pioneer world six thousand twenty-four]] is a source of food and materials untouched by the [[Collapse]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“Pioneer world six thousand twenty-four,” Eithan introduced. “Miraculously untouched by the Collapse, it remains a source of food and materials that we can’t harvest from any world with a stable connection to the Way.”<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
